name: Indonesian-Style Yogurt Rice
recipeIngredient: 1 cup Plain yogurt, room temperature (1/2 pt.)
recipeInstructions:
1. Heat 1/4 cup of milk and steep the saffron threads for 20 minutes.
2. Sauté onion and garlic in oil until fragrant.
3. Add ginger and rice to the pan, coating the grains well.
4. Stir in the remaining ingredients: the rest of the milk, yogurt, salt, and pepper.
5. Cover and cook over low heat until the rice is tender and fluffy.
6. Serve immediately.
